name: Northern Bald Ibis
conservationEfforts: Moroccan population stable at about 700 birds. Reintroduction projects in Spain, Austria, and Turkey. Waldrapp team leads migration training with ultralight aircraft for reintroduced birds.
description: Once found across southern Europe, North Africa, and the Middle East, this distinctive bald-headed ibis now survives mainly in Morocco. Reintroduction projects aim to restore European populations.
